steps.title: Spot the key contrast
steps.content: The passage uses “but” to contradict the classification—the basking shark's elevated body temperature (finding) conflicts with being a “full ectotherm” (classification).

steps.title: Pick the right contrast word
steps.content: Incongruous with means not in agreement or incompatible—capturing the mismatch between the finding and classification. The other choices wrongly suggest hierarchy (subordinate to), advantage (opportune for), or confirmation (indicative of). That matches choice A — A is correct.
